---
title: "Final Report"
subtitle: |
  | Final Project 
  | Data Science 1 with R (STAT 301-1)
author: "Chau Tran"
pagetitle: "PM1 Chau Tran"
date: today

format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: left
    embed-resources: true
    link-external-newwindow: true

execute:
  warning: false
  echo: false

from: markdown+emoji
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
---
::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
## Github Repo Link

[Tran Chau's Final Project Github Repo](https://github.com/stat301-1-2024-fall/final-project-1-bunmam-ctrl.git)

:::

```{r}
#| label: load pck
library(tidyverse)
library(naniar)
```

```{r}
#| label: convert data 
abortion <- read_csv("data/global_abortion_raw.csv")|>
  janitor::clean_names()

violence <-  read_csv("data/violence_raw.csv")|>
  janitor::clean_names()

```

```{r}
#| label: tidy_violence

violence_distinct <- violence|>
  distinct(country)

violence_distinct

#add iso to violence
violence_iso <- violence|>
  mutate( iso = case_when(
    country %in% "Afghanistan" ~ "4",
    country %in% "Albania" ~ "8",
    country %in% "Angola" ~ "24",
    country %in% "Armenia" ~ "51",
    country %in% "Azerbaijan" ~ "31",
    country %in% "Bangladesh" ~ "50",
    country %in% "Benin" ~ "204",
    country %in% "Bolivia" ~ "68",
    country %in% "Burkina Faso" ~ "854",
    country %in% "Burundi" ~ "108",
    
  
    
  )
    
  )
```
